member.name: T:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo
member.summary: Provides structured error information for failed operations.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.Code
member.summary: Gets the error code.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.Message
member.summary: Gets the error message.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.Exception
member.summary: Gets the exception that caused the error, if any.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets the timestamp when the error occurred.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.Metadata
member.summary: Gets optional metadata associated with the error.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Exception,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyDictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The exception that caused the error.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity
member.summary: Severity levels for result outcomes.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity.None
member.summary: No severity (success).

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity.Info
member.summary: Informational message.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity.Warning
member.summary: Warning — operation succeeded with caveats.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity.Error
member.summary: Error — operation failed.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ResultSeverity.Critical
member.summary: Critical — operation failed with severe consequences.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Common.Result
member.summary: Non-generic result for void operations.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Error
member.summary: Gets the error information, if any.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Severity
member.summary: Gets the severity of the result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Success
member.summary: Creates a successful result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Warning(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a warning result (success with caveats).

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Failure(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Failure(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed result with an error code.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Failure(System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a failed result from an exception.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Failure(Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo)
member.summary: Creates a failed result from an .

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Combine(Better11.Core.Common.Result[])
member.summary: Combines multiple results, returning failure if any failed.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Tap(System.Action)
member.summary: Executes an action if the result is successful.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result.Match``1(System.Func{``0},System.Func{Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo,``0})
member.summary: Matches the result to a value.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1
member.summary: Generic result wrapping a value or error.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.IsFailure
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the operation failed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Value
member.summary: Gets the value if successful.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Error
member.summary: Gets the error information if failed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Severity
member.summary: Gets the severity of the result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Success(`0)
member.summary: Creates a successful result with a value.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Warning(`0,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a warning result (success with caveats).

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Failure(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Failure(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failed result with an error code.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Failure(System.Exception)
member.summary: Creates a failed result from an exception.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Failure(Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo)
member.summary: Creates a failed result from an .

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.op_Implicit(`0)~Better11.Core.Common.Result{`0}
member.summary: Implicit conversion from value to success result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Map``1(System.Func{`0,``0})
member.summary: Maps the value to a new type.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Bind``1(System.Func{`0,Better11.Core.Common.Result{``0}})
member.summary: Flat-maps the value to a new result.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Match``1(System.Func{`0,``0},System.Func{Better11.Core.Common.ErrorInfo,``0})
member.summary: Matches the result to a value.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Tap(System.Action{`0})
member.summary: Executes an action on the value if successful.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.Ensure(System.Func{`0,System.Boolean},System.String)
member.summary: Validates the value against a predicate.
member.param: The error message if validation fails.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.GetValueOrDefault(`0)
member.summary: Returns the value or a default.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Common.Result`1.ToResult
member.summary: Converts to a non-generic result.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes
member.summary: Well-known error codes used throughout Better11.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.General
member.summary: General error.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Exception
member.summary: Exception-based error.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Validation
member.summary: Validation error.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Warning
member.summary: Warning (non-fatal).

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Aggregate
member.summary: Aggregate of multiple errors.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Cancelled
member.summary: Operation was cancelled.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Timeout
member.summary: Operation timed out.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.NotFound
member.summary: Resource not found.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.AccessDenied
member.summary: Access denied.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.PowerShell
member.summary: PowerShell execution error.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Common.ErrorCodes.Configuration
member.summary: Configuration error.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants
member.summary: Constants for application settings keys used with .

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.FirstRunCompleted
member.summary: Key indicating whether the first-run wizard has been completed.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.SelectedTheme
member.summary: Key for the user-selected application theme (Dark, Light, or System).

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.AutoRefreshEnabled
member.summary: Key indicating whether automatic data refresh is enabled.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.AutoRefreshIntervalSeconds
member.summary: Key for the automatic refresh interval in seconds.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.LastScanDate
member.summary: Key for the date/time of the last system scan.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.SelectedPreset
member.summary: Key for the currently selected optimization preset.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.AppliedModules
member.summary: Key for the list of applied optimization modules.

member.name: F:Better11.Core.Constants.SettingsConstants.Telemetry
member.summary: Key indicating whether anonymous usage telemetry is enabled (opt-in).

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AutoLoginDto
member.summary: Auto-login configuration.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AutoLoginDto.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether auto-login is enabled.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AutoLoginDto.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the auto-login username.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AutoLoginDto.Domain
member.summary: Gets or sets the domain.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto
member.summary: Backup schedule DTO.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the schedule name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.SourcePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the source path.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.DestinationPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination path.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.Frequency
member.summary: Gets or sets the frequency (e.g. Daily, Weekly).

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.RetentionDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the retention in days.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.NextRun
member.summary: Gets or sets the next run time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.BackupScheduleDto.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the schedule is enabled.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto
member.summary: File backup entry DTO.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the backup name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.SourcePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the source path.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.DestinationPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the destination path.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.Created
member.summary: Gets or sets the creation time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.SizeMb
member.summary: Gets or sets the size in MB.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.Compressed
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the backup is compressed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.Encrypted
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the backup is encrypted.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.FileBackupDto.FileCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the file count.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.GroupMemberDto
member.summary: Group membership entry.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.GroupMemberDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the member name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.GroupMemberDto.Sid
member.summary: Gets or sets the SID.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.GroupMemberDto.ObjectClass
member.summary: Gets or sets the object class.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.GroupMemberDto.PrincipalSource
member.summary: Gets or sets the principal source.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService
member.summary: Service interface for backup and restore (restore points, registry, file backup, schedules).

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.GetRestorePointsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of system restore points.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.CreateRestorePointAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a system restore point with the given description.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.DeleteRestorePointAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a restore point by sequence number.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.GetRegistryBackupsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of registry backups.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.ExportRegistryKeyAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Exports a registry key to a backup file.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.ImportRegistryBackupAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Imports a registry backup from the given file path.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.GetFileBackupsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of file backups.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.CreateFileBackupAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a file backup from source to destination.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.RestoreFileBackupAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Restores a file backup to the given path.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.GetSchedulesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of backup schedules.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.CreateScheduleAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a backup schedule.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IBackupRestoreService.DeleteScheduleAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a backup schedule by name.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput
member.summary: Output model for PowerShell script execution results.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.Output
member.summary: Gets the standard output lines.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.Errors
member.summary: Gets the error output lines.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.Warnings
member.summary: Gets the warning output lines.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.Verbose
member.summary: Gets the verbose output lines.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.HasErrors
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether there were errors.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.FirstOutput
member.summary: Gets the first output line or empty string.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets the combined error message.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PowerShellOutput.Duration
member.summary: Gets the execution duration.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService
member.summary: Defines the contract for executing PowerShell commands and scripts. Thread-safe. All methods support cancellation.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.InvokeCommandAsync``1(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invokes a PowerShell command and deserializes the result to a single object.
member.returns: A result containing the deserialized object.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.InvokeCommandListAsync``1(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invokes a PowerShell command and deserializes results to a list.
member.returns: A result containing the deserialized list.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.InvokeCommandVoidAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Invokes a PowerShell command that returns no value.
member.returns: A result indicating success or failure.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.ExecuteScriptAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a raw PowerShell script.
member.returns: A result containing the script output.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.TestModuleAvailableAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests whether a PowerShell module is available.
member.returns: True if the module is importable.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPowerShellService.GetDiagnostics
member.summary: Gets diagnostic information about the PowerShell service.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService
member.summary: Defines navigation operations for the application shell.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.CurrentPage
member.summary: Gets the current page type.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.CanGoBack
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether back navigation is possible.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.NavigateTo(System.Type,System.Object)
member.summary: Navigates to a page.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.NavigateTo(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Navigates to a page by key.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.GoBack
member.summary: Navigates back.

member.name: E:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INavigationService.Navigated
member.summary: Raised when navigation occurs.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDialogService
member.summary: Defines dialog and notification operations.

member.summary: Shows an information dialog.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDialogService.ShowWarningAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows a warning dialog.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDialogService.ShowErrorAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows an error dialog.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDialogService.ShowConfirmAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows a confirmation dialog.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService
member.summary: Defines application settings persistence.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService.GetValue``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets a setting value.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService.SetValue``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Sets a setting value.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService.SaveAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all settings to disk.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISettingsService.LoadAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads all settings from disk.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPackageService
member.summary: Defines package management operations.

member.summary: Gets all installed packages.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPackageService.GetAvailableUpdatesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets available package updates.

member.summary: Installs a package.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPackageService.UninstallPackageAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Uninstalls a package.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPackageService.UpdatePackageAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates a package.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IPackageService.SearchPackagesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Searches for packages.

member.summary: Package data transfer object.

member.summary: Gets or sets the package identifier.

member.summary: Gets or sets the display name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PackageDto.Version
member.summary: Gets or sets the installed version.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PackageDto.AvailableVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the available version.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PackageDto.Source
member.summary: Gets or sets the package source.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PackageDto.Publisher
member.summary: Gets or sets the publisher.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PackageDto.HasUpdate
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether an update is available.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDriverService
member.summary: Defines driver management operations.

member.summary: Gets all installed drivers.

member.summary: Scans for driver updates.

member.summary: Updates a driver.

member.summary: Creates a driver backup.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IDriverService.RollbackDriverAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rolls back a driver.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto
member.summary: Driver data transfer object.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.DeviceId
member.summary: Gets or sets the device ID.

member.summary: Gets or sets the device name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.DriverVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the driver version.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.DriverDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the driver date.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.Manufacturer
member.summary: Gets or sets the manufacturer.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the device category.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the driver status.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DriverDto.HasUpdate
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether an update is available.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IStartupService
member.summary: Defines startup item management.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IStartupService.GetStartupItemsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets all startup items.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IStartupService.EnableStartupItemAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables a startup item.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IStartupService.DisableStartupItemAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disables a startup item.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IStartupService.RemoveStartupItemAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a startup item.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto
member.summary: Startup item data transfer object.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the item identifier.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Publisher
member.summary: Gets or sets the publisher.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Command
member.summary: Gets or sets the command.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Location
member.summary: Gets or sets the location (Registry/Folder).

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.Impact
member.summary: Gets or sets the startup impact.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.StartupItemDto.IsEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the item is enabled.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IScheduledTaskService
member.summary: Defines scheduled task management.

member.summary: Gets all scheduled tasks.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IScheduledTaskService.EnableTaskAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables a scheduled task.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IScheduledTaskService.DisableTaskAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disables a scheduled task.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IScheduledTaskService.RunTaskAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a scheduled task immediately.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto
member.summary: Scheduled task data transfer object.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.TaskPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the task path.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.TaskName
member.summary: Gets or sets the task name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.State
member.summary: Gets or sets the state.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.LastRunTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the last run time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.NextRunTime
member.summary: Gets or sets the next run time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.Author
member.summary: Gets or sets the author.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ScheduledTaskDto.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INetworkService
member.summary: Defines network management operations.

member.summary: Gets all network adapters.

member.summary: Gets DNS configuration.

member.summary: Sets DNS servers.

member.summary: Flushes the DNS cache.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.INetworkService.RunDiagnosticsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs a network connectivity test.

member.summary: Gets or sets the adapter ID.

member.summary: Gets or sets the name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the IP address.

member.summary: Gets or sets the speed in Mbps.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.NetworkAdapterDto.AdapterType
member.summary: Gets or sets the adapter type.

member.summary: Gets or sets the primary DNS server.

member.summary: Gets or sets the secondary DNS server.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.DnsConfigDto.DnsSuffix
member.summary: Gets or sets the DNS suffix.

member.summary: Network diagnostics data transfer object.

member.summary: Gets or sets the internet connectivity status.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.NetworkDiagnosticsDto.LatencyMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the latency in ms.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.NetworkDiagnosticsDto.DownloadSpeedMbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the download speed in Mbps.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.NetworkDiagnosticsDto.UploadSpeedMbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the upload speed in Mbps.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.NetworkDiagnosticsDto.DnsResolutionMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the DNS resolution time in ms.

member.summary: Gets or sets the cleanable categories.

member.summary: Gets or sets the reclaimable bytes.

member.summary: Gets or sets the file count.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether it is selected by default.

member.summary: Cleanup result.

member.summary: Gets or sets the bytes freed.

member.summary: Gets or sets the files removed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.CleanupResultDto.Errors
member.summary: Gets or sets the errors encountered.

member.summary: Disk space information.

member.summary: Gets or sets the drive letter.

member.summary: Gets or sets the volume label.

member.summary: Gets or sets the total size in bytes.

member.summary: Gets or sets the free space in bytes.

member.summary: Gets the used space in bytes.

member.summary: Gets the usage percentage.

member.summary: Gets comprehensive system information.

member.summary: Gets current performance metrics.

member.summary: Gets or sets the OS name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the OS version.

member.summary: Gets or sets the OS build.

member.summary: Gets or sets the CPU name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.SystemInfoDto.TotalRamGb
member.summary: Gets or sets the total RAM in GB.

member.summary: Gets or sets the GPU name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.SystemInfoDto.Uptime
member.summary: Gets or sets the system uptime.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.SystemInfoDto.ActivationStatus
member.summary: Gets or sets the Windows activation status.

member.summary: Gets or sets the BIOS version.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.SystemInfoDto.Motherboard
member.summary: Gets or sets the motherboard model.

member.summary: Performance metrics data transfer object.

member.summary: Gets or sets the CPU usage percentage.

member.summary: Gets or sets the memory usage percentage.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.AvailableMemoryGb
member.summary: Gets or sets the available memory in GB.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.DiskReadMbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the disk read speed in MB/s.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.DiskWriteMbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the disk write speed in MB/s.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.NetworkSendKbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the network send in KB/s.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.NetworkReceiveKbps
member.summary: Gets or sets the network receive in KB/s.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.GpuUsagePercent
member.summary: Gets or sets the GPU usage percentage.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PerformanceMetricsDto.ProcessCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the process count.

member.summary: Applies optimizations.

member.summary: Creates a restore point before optimization.

member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether it is currently applied.

member.summary: Gets or sets the risk level.

member.summary: Optimization result.

member.summary: Gets or sets the number of tweaks applied.

member.summary: Gets or sets tweaks that failed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.OptimizationResultDto.RebootRequired
member.summary: Gets or sets whether a reboot is required.

member.summary: Defines Windows Update management operations.

member.summary: Checks for available updates.

member.summary: Installs selected updates.

member.summary: Gets update history.

member.summary: Windows Update data transfer object.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the update ID.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.KbNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the KB number.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.SizeBytes
member.summary: Gets or sets the size in bytes.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.Category
member.summary: Gets or sets the category.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.IsInstalled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether it is installed.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.WindowsUpdateDto.InstalledDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the install date.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAppUpdateService
member.summary: Defines application (Better11) update check, download, and install operations.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAppUpdateService.CheckForUpdatesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks for a newer application version; returns update info if available.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAppUpdateService.DownloadUpdateAsync(Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads the update package to a temporary file and returns its path.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAppUpdateService.InstallUpdateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Installs the update from the downloaded package path (e.g. launches MSIX installer).

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo
member.summary: Application update information from the version manifest.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo.Version
member.summary: Gets or sets the available version string (e.g. "1.1.0").

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo.DownloadUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the download URL for the update package (e.g. MSIX).

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo.ReleaseNotes
member.summary: Gets or sets optional release notes or description.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.AppUpdateInfo.PublishDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the published date of the release.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAnalyticsService
member.summary: Defines analytics and telemetry tracking capabilities.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAnalyticsService.TrackEventAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks a custom event.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAnalyticsService.TrackExceptionAsync(System.Exception,System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary{System.String,System.String},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks an exception.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IAnalyticsService.TrackPageViewAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tracks a page view.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService
member.summary: Provides system tray integration for Better11 with notification and quick action capabilities.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.IsVisible
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the system tray is visible.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.Tooltip
member.summary: Gets the current tooltip text.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.ShowAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Shows the system tray icon.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.HideAsync
member.summary: Hides the system tray icon.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.ShowNotificationAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Shows a notification balloon.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.AddContextMenuItemAsync(System.String,System.Windows.Input.ICommand)
member.summary: Adds a context menu item.
member.param: The command to execute when clicked.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.AddContextMenuSeparatorAsync
member.summary: Adds a context menu separator.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.AddContextMenuSubmenuAsync(System.String,System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.Windows.Input.ICommand}[])
member.summary: Adds a submenu to the context menu.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.UpdateTooltipAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the tooltip text.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.UpdateIconAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the system tray icon.
member.param: Path to the new icon file.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.ShowContextMenuAsync
member.summary: Shows the context menu at the current cursor position.

member.name: E:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.DoubleClicked
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray icon is double-clicked.

member.name: E:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.RightClicked
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray icon is right-clicked.

member.name: E:Better11.Core.Interfaces.ISystemTrayService.Disposed
member.summary: Event raised when the system tray service is disposed.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService
member.summary: Service interface for the User Account Manager feature.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetLocalAccountsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of local user accounts.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.CreateAccountAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a local account with the given username, password, and full name.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.DeleteAccountAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a local account by username.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.SetAccountEnabledAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables or disables a local account.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetLocalGroupsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of local groups.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetGroupMembersAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the members of a local group.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.AddGroupMemberAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds a user to a local group.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.RemoveGroupMemberAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a user from a local group.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetPasswordPolicyAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current password policy.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.SetPasswordPolicyAsync(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets the password policy (min length, complexity, max age).

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetAutoLoginAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the current auto-login configuration.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.SetAutoLoginAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Enables auto-login for the given user and password.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.DisableAutoLoginAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Disables auto-login.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetUserProfilesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets the list of user profiles.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetSecurityAuditAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets recent security audit events.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.GetUserSessionsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets active user sessions.

member.name: M:Better11.Core.Interfaces.IUserAccountService.LogoffSessionAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Logs off the session with the given ID.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto
member.summary: Local user account information.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.FullName
member.summary: Gets or sets the full name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.Sid
member.summary: Gets or sets the SID.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the account is enabled.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.IsAdmin
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the account is an administrator.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.LastLogin
member.summary: Gets or sets the last login time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.PasswordNeverExpires
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the password never expires.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalAccountDto.IsLockedOut
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the account is locked out.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalGroupDto
member.summary: Local group information.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalGroupDto.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the group name.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalGroupDto.Sid
member.summary: Gets or sets the SID.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalGroupDto.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.LocalGroupDto.MemberCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the member count.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto
member.summary: Password policy settings.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.MinLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum password length.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.ComplexityEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether complexity is required.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.MaxAgeDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum password age in days.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.MinAgeDays
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum password age in days.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.HistoryCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the password history count.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.LockoutThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the lockout threshold.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.PasswordPolicyDto.LockoutDurationMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the lockout duration in minutes.

member.name: T:Better11.Core.Interfaces.RegistryBackupDto
member.summary: Registry backup entry DTO.

member.summary: Gets or sets the backup name.

member.summary: Gets or sets the registry key path.

member.summary: Gets or sets the backup file path.

member.summary: Gets or sets the creation time.

member.name: P:Better11.Core.Interfaces.RegistryBackupDto.SizeKb
member.summary: Gets or sets the size in KB.

member.summary: Gets or sets the creation time.

member.summary: Gets or sets the event timestamp.

member.summary: Gets or sets the result.

member.summary: Gets or sets the username.

member.summary: Gets or sets the profile path.

member.summary: Gets or sets the profile size in MB.

member.summary: Gets or sets the last use time.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the profile is loaded.

member.summary: Gets or sets the session state.

member.summary: Gets or sets the session type.
